# Welcome to ACL Discussions!

Hey there! Thanks for checking out **ACL (Agent Collaboration Layer)**.

This is the place to ask questions, share ideas, and connect with other users. Here's how to use Discussions:

**🙋 Q&A** — Stuck on setup? Not sure how to configure agent routing? Ask here.

**💡 Ideas** — Have a feature idea or workflow suggestion? We'd love to hear it.

**🎉 Show and Tell** — Built something cool with ACL? Share your DAG configs, benchmarks, or use cases.

**💬 General** — Anything else related to multi-agent orchestration.

## Quick Links

- [README & Quick Start](https://github.com/kkumdam/AgentsCollaborationLayer#quick-start)
- [Bug Reports](https://github.com/kkumdam/AgentsCollaborationLayer/issues/new?template=bug_report.md)
- [Feature Requests](https://github.com/kkumdam/AgentsCollaborationLayer/issues/new?template=feature_request.md)

## A Few Questions to Get Started

We'd love your input:

1. Which AI CLIs are you currently using? (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI)
2. What kind of workflows would you like to automate with ACL?
3. How did you find this project?

Feel free to introduce yourself and say hi!
